example.japanese: 彼は村に住んでいます。

name: 映画館
explanation: A JLPT N5 noun meaning "movie theatre".

example.english: I work at a movie theater.
This bridge is made of iron.

name: 外国
explanation: A JLPT N5 noun, no adjective meaning "foreign country".

example.english: I want to go to another country.

お風呂はついてますか。

name: 食堂
explanation: A JLPT N5 noun meaning "dining room".

example.english: There was an accident at the intersection.

name: 交番
explanation: A JLPT N5 noun meaning "police box".

example.english: A police station is close at hand.

example.japanese: お手洗いはどこですか。
彼は大学に勤めています。

name: 門
explanation: A JLPT N5 noun, noun, used as a suffix meaning "gate".

example.japanese: オランダ大使館はどこですか？
ポストはどこにありますか。

name: アパート
explanation: A JLPT N5 noun meaning "apartment building".

トイレは廊下の左側にあります。
example.english: The bathroom is on the left side of the hallway.

name: 郵便局
explanation: A JLPT N5 noun meaning "post office".

name: 所
explanation: A JLPT N5 noun, adverb, suffix meaning "place".

example.japanese: どんな所がお好きですか。

name: デパート
explanation: A JLPT N5 noun meaning "department store".

example.english: I bought it at a department store.
